issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but missing required 'cost' field for [Activate: Main] ➁ activation

Action type 'SearchDeck' is incorrect. This effect reveals from deck (conditional play), not searches. Should use 'RevealFromHand' or custom reveal mechanic, then conditionally 'PlayFromHand' or 'PlaySelf' if conditions met
Filter uses 'ByName' but should filter by type {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} AND cost ≤4. Current filter is incomplete and targets wrong source
Missing condition logic: card must be from top of deck reveal, be {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type, AND have cost ≤4. Current DSL has no conditions
Destination 'board' is incomplete. Card should be played 'rested' (Rest status required), then non-matching card goes to bottom of deck

filter.type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
